dependencies: Ground leases for land underlying tower structures
Long-term lease contracts with wireless service providers
Dependence on small number of wireless service provider customers
risks: Concentration of revenue from limited number of customers
Supplier and contractor availability for tower construction

regulatory_risks: FCC regulations on tower construction, lighting, painting and marking
FAA regulations on tower height and air navigation hazards
State and local zoning restrictions and ordinances
RF energy exposure regulations and health risk concerns
Environmental laws on contamination and remediation
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code
Foreign ownership restrictions on land in international markets
Data privacy and protection laws (Brazil GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act)

sanction_risks: Potential changes in trade restrictions and tariffs proposed by US
Retaliatory trade restrictions and tariffs by other countries
Laws and regulations restricting repatriation of earnings or capital distributions
Expropriation and governmental regulation restricting foreign ownership
Political and economic instability in developing markets
Currency restrictions and exchange rate fluctuations
